{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Tedoria Sixty-Six
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Dalton Foster]] lost a deal on a [[Tedoria Sixty-Six]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
